description: The team lands the Zephyr One in 1955 near Area 51, quickly realizing they are in the past. While discussing their mission, they analyze the clues, listen to a period-appropriate radio, and review the risks of being detected in this era. Coulson provides background on Area 51 as a S.H.I.E.L.D. base, and Simmons explains how the time jumps work. The team debates their next move and the potential impact of their presence in the past.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: I told you, this is where I saw it.
I thought that was just a line to get me up here.
Yes. And I'm here, aren't I?
Autopilot pulled us out of the dive.
We should probably be flying when we jump. Live and learn.
At least he has time to spare.
GPS isn't working. I'm gonna try and find a topographical match.
There it is. And we hear you want more Perry Como. We've got him up next.
Please tell me that's an oldies station.
But first, a word from our sponsors at Conway Auto. They've got the brand new ‘55 Thunderbird. Stop by and take the road by storm...
‘55? As in our giant spaceship just appeared in the sky in 1955?
Let's hope we didn't attract too much attention.
Well, about that... I may actually have some good news. We're just north of Groom Lake, Nevada. Home of Area 51. Probably happens all the time.
